name: vinheria-agnello-ui
description: UI mobile-first da Vinheria Agnello baseada no protótipo

scripts.test: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const files=['public/index.html','public/css/styles.css','public/js/app.js','public/assets/wines','README.md','package.json','server/server.js']; const missing=files.filter(f=>!fs.existsSync(f)); if(missing.length){console.error('Missing: '+missing.join(', ')); process.exit(1);} console.log('OK');"
